app.name: DESCHIL
app.tagline: Unified AI automation across web, Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord.

dashboard.title: Command Console
dashboard.subtitle: Run any automation from here. The same commands are available on your bots.

landing.feature1Body: The web dashboard, Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord all execute the same commands.
landing.feature2Body: Plug in OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, Groq, DeepSeek, Mistral, xAI — swap anytime.
landing.feature3Body: Role-based access, audit logs, Arabic and English out of the box.
